creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #4) Hello, I am about to create PRs to fix all those ports. I successfully reach the links using freefall as a proxy, however all logs from comment #2 seems to have been removed. Indeed, for all of them I get the following response: 404 Not Found

404 Not Found

nginx/1.20.2
Could you please check if the logs still exist and, if not, run the exp-run for i386 again? Thanks.
